short_version_body: AskBiz POS uses minimal, essential storage to keep the app working. With your consent, we also use privacy-friendly Google Analytics to understand app usage. Nothing beyond the essential storage is set until you accept it in the consent banner.
row_staff_purpose: Keeps your staff sign-in session active
row_consent_purpose: Remembers your cookie choice (essential-only or analytics accepted)
row_offline_purpose: Stores cash sales during connectivity loss
row_ga_purpose: Anonymised usage analytics — only set if you accept analytics
analytics_body_1: With your consent, we use Google Analytics (GA4) to understand how the POS is used — which screens are visited and how often — so we can improve it. We do not use advertising pixels, and we do not sell data or share it with advertisers. Google Analytics is not loaded until you accept it in the consent banner.
analytics_body_2: You can withdraw consent at any time by clearing this site's storage in your browser — the consent banner will show again on your next visit, letting you choose essential-only again.
managing_storage_body: You can clear this storage at any time by signing out of the POS or clearing your browser’s site data. Clearing it will sign you out and may discard any unsynced offline sales.
more_info_body_after: for full detail on the data we process, or contact privacy@askbiz.co.
